moments.title: England's World Cup 2026 Opener
moments.blurb: England kick off their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Croatia on Wednesday, June 17, at 9 PM BST in Dallas, USA.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Gareth Southgate's Three Lions begin their World Cup journey this Wednesday! England v Croatia, 9pm kick-off. Where are you watching?

angles.name: Pre-match Chat
angles.copy: It's almost time for England's first game! Can they go all the way this year? Tune in Wednesday at 9pm.

moments.title: Scotland's Next World Cup Clash
moments.blurb: Scotland continue their World Cup 2026 group stage matches, facing Morocco on Friday, June 19, at 11 PM UK time.

angles.name: Scottish Hopes
angles.copy: C'mon Scotland! The Tartan Army are back in action this Friday against Morocco. Get ready for a late one!

angles.name: Game Day Buzz
angles.copy: Who's staying up for Scotland's next World Cup match? Friday night, 11pm kick-off – let's hear your predictions!

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival runs until June 19, featuring artists like The Stranglers (June 16), Nile Rodgers & CHIC (June 17), Elvis Costello (June 18), and Sophie Ellis-Bextor (June 19).

angles.name: This Week's Line-up
angles.copy: Hampton Court Palace Festival is in full swing! This week, catch The Stranglers, Nile Rodgers & CHIC, Elvis Costello, and Sophie Ellis-Bextor.

angles.name: Iconic Acts
angles.copy: From disco legends Nile Rodgers & CHIC to punk icons The Stranglers, Hampton Court Palace Festival has a stellar week ahead!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival takes place from June 18-21, bringing a diverse line-up of music to Newport.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival is HERE! Who's heading to Newport for four days of incredible live music from Thursday?

angles.name: Get Ready to Rock
angles.copy: The legendary Isle of Wight Festival kicks off this Thursday! Sun, sea, and sensational music – what more could you want?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from June 19-21, with headliners like The Lumineers and The Proclaimers.

angles.name: Glasgow's Big Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend! Ready for The Lumineers, The Proclaimers and more?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's got their tickets for TRNSMT? Glasgow is set for an epic weekend of music starting Friday!

moments.title: Parklife Festival Hits Manchester
moments.blurb: Manchester's Heaton Park is the venue for Parklife Festival on June 20-21, featuring a massive line-up of pop, indie, and dance acts.

angles.name: Manchester Party
angles.copy: Parklife Festival is back in Manchester this weekend! Who's ready for two days of non-stop music at Heaton Park?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Heaton Park is about to go off! Parklife Festival kicks off Saturday – what acts are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Harlan Coben's 'I Will Find You' on Netflix
moments.blurb: The latest Harlan Coben crime thriller limited series, 'I Will Find You', starring Sam Worthington, premieres on Netflix on June 18.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch is here! Harlan Coben's 'I Will Find You' drops on Netflix this Wednesday. Get ready for twists and turns!

angles.name: Coben's Latest
angles.copy: Another week, another Harlan Coben thriller! 'I Will Find You' hits Netflix this Wednesday – who's clearing their schedule?

moments.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash Streams on Disney+
moments.blurb: James Cameron's latest Avatar film, 'Avatar: Fire and Ash', becomes available to stream on Disney+ from June 24.

angles.name: Pandora Returns
angles.copy: Back to Pandora! James Cameron's 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' arrives on Disney+ next Tuesday. Are you ready for more stunning visuals?

angles.name: Streaming Blockbuster
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' hits Disney+ next week. Perfect for a mid-week movie night!

moments.title: Summer Solstice 2026
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How will you make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sunrise Celebrations
angles.copy: Sunday marks the Summer Solstice! Many will be gathering at Stonehenge and other ancient sites to greet the dawn. Will you be celebrating?

moments.title: Ice Cube's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Today, June 15, marks the 57th birthday of rapper, actor, and filmmaker Ice Cube, born in 1969.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary Ice Cube! From N.W.A. to Hollywood, what's your favourite Ice Cube track or movie?

moments.title: Barry Manilow's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Barry Manilow, known for hits like 'Mandy' and 'Copacabana', celebrates his 83rd birthday on June 17, born in 1943.

angles.name: Fanilows Unite
angles.copy: It's Barry Manilow's 83rd birthday on Wednesday! Celebrate the 'Copacabana' crooner with his timeless classics.

moments.title: Kendrick Lamar's 39th Birthday
moments.blurb: Pulitzer Prize-winning rapper Kendrick Lamar celebrates his 39th birthday on June 17, born in 1987.

angles.name: Rap Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to one of the greatest rappers of all time, Kendrick Lamar! What's your favourite K-Dot track?

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Music legend Sir Paul McCartney, of The Beatles and Wings fame, celebrates his 84th birthday on June 18, born in 1942.

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: An absolute icon turns 84 this Thursday! Happy Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney. What's your favourite Beatles or Wings song?

moments.title: Alison Moyet's 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer Alison Moyet, known for her work with Yazoo and her successful solo career, turns 65 on June 18, born in 1961.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 65th Birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet this Thursday! What's your favourite Yazoo or solo hit?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B icon Lionel Richie, known for his work with The Commodores and his hugely successful solo career, celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20, born in 1949.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday this Saturday! Celebrate with his incredible back catalogue.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her distinctive melancholic style, celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21, born in 1985.

angles.name: Birthday Queen
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the enigmatic Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your go-to track from her incredible discography?

moments.title: Ray Davies' 82nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Ray Davies, lead singer and songwriter of The Kinks, celebrates his 82nd birthday on June 21, born in 1944.

angles.name: Kinks Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to the iconic Ray Davies this Sunday! What's your favourite Kinks anthem?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Cyndi Lauper, famous for her vibrant personality and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 on June 22, born in 1953.

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper this Monday. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

moments.title: Jason Mraz's 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for his feel-good acoustic pop, celebrates his 49th birthday on June 23, born in 1977.

angles.name: Good Vibes
angles.copy: It's a happy 49th birthday to the 'I'm Yours' singer, Jason Mraz, this Tuesday! What's your favourite Mraz tune?

moments.title: Duffy's 42nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Welsh singer Duffy, acclaimed for her retro-soul sound and hits like 'Mercy', celebrates her 42nd birthday on June 23, born in 1984.

angles.name: Welsh Soul Star
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to Wales' very own soul sensation, Duffy, this Tuesday! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Retro Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 42nd Birthday to the incredible Duffy on Tuesday! Her timeless voice and 'Mercy' still sound amazing.
